description: Intentionally vulnerable Flask app for security benchmark testing

vulnerabilities.description: SECRET_KEY hardcoded in source code, used for JWT/session signing
String % formatting used to embed user input (username) directly into SQL query
User-controlled host parameter concatenated into os.popen() shell command
User-supplied filename concatenated to base_dir without os.path.realpath() validation
pickle.loads() called directly on untrusted user-supplied POST body data
